voice.description: Warm, professional, and encouraging. Uses first-person, speaks directly to the client. Balances expertise with approachability.
sampleMessages: Hi! I'd love to help you explore your options. Whether you're buying or selling, I'm here to make the process as smooth as possible.
Great news — I just ran the numbers on your home and the market is looking strong in your area. Let's chat about what this means for you!
I know the process can feel overwhelming, but that's exactly why I'm here. Let's take it one step at a time.
